title: Zrikon's Furniture : Medieval
description: Adds new blocks for medieval-style decoration
body:
**![](https://i.gyazo.com/c33e5e6239ac74822f368efc6878c3b6.png)**

----------

**about:**

This mod adds medieval furniture to the game, which can be used to decorate houses, castles, and public buildings. Some items may have functionality, but the main purpose of the mod is visual variety and immersion in the Middle Ages.

![](https://i.gyazo.com/6b0df1a317289224d81237a0f6b62bdf.png)

![](https://i.gyazo.com/c8a8d6c05ffc8ca3af9e5d05ab1b5067.png)

![](https://i.gyazo.com/e5db383bb7264d7776f2dea05a12d0b5.png)

![](https://i.gyazo.com/f43dc9b9fae821bec9eaed88c847a8b7.png)

![](https://i.gyazo.com/99afa5ebc752953d8e9b024f832c46d5.png)

----------

**Features:**

We plan to make more diverse furniture if the mod becomes popular enough.

----------
